ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
Language: c%23
OpenDeepWiki is the open-source version of the DeepWiki project, aiming to provide a powerful knowledge management and collaboration platform. The project is mainly developed using C# and TypeScript, supporting modular design, and is easy to expand and customize.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alex-Rachel/TEngine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alex-Rachel/TEngine
Language: c%23
Unity 商用级别开发框架，原生内置 AI 工作流支持，集成 HybridCLR 高性能热更、Obfuz 代码混淆加固、YooAssets 企业级资源管理方案，构建高效、安全、可扩展的工业化开发底座。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ClassIsland/ClassIsland
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ClassIsland/ClassIsland
Language: c%23
一款功能强、可定制、跨平台，适用于班级多媒体屏幕的课表信息显示工具，可以一目了然地显示各种信息。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles with an emphasis on ease of use and extensibility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Orbmu2k/nvidiaProfileInspector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Orbmu2k/nvidiaProfileInspector
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: btcpayserver/btcpayserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver
Language: c%23
Accept Bitcoin payments. Free, open-source & self-hosted, Bitcoin payment processor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: devlooped/moq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/devlooped/moq
Language: c%23
The most popular and friendly mocking framework for .NET

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23
The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lostindark/DriverStoreExplorer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lostindark/DriverStoreExplorer
Language: c%23
Driver Store Explorer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/vstest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/vstest
Language: c%23
Visual Studio Test Platform is the runner and engine that powers test explorer and vstest.console.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
